title: The adventure begins
description: OUDTSHOORN NEWS - The Dryland Traverse is a...
bodyText:
OUDTSHOORN NEWS - The Dryland Traverse is a race like no other! This epic race started on Thursday and ends tomorrow, 3 November.


> A Fancy Dress will be held tonight, and the proceedings will conclude tomorrow with a celebration of singletrack.


The whole weekend is action-packed from start to finish. The 2024 edition sees almost 300 participants conquering the Swartberg Pass and Klein Karoo trails.

“The Dryland Traverse is not just a race; it’s a journey of self-discovery, camaraderie, and personal triumph. For us at Dryland, it is the best way to celebrate the end of another successful year,” remarked Bernard le Roux from Dryland Event Management.

‘Ons bring jou die nuutste Tuinroete, Hessequa, Karoo nuus’
